prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第2章　桜の折り返し / 第2話　折り返して戻る. Scene focus: 第2節　反対岸の朝日 / セラパート. Summary: だがサービス道路脇では、河川管理車を装ったワゴンが止まり、作業服の男たちがカラーコーンを並べていた。迂回を装って標的を車道寄りへ誘導し、そこで囲い込むつもりなのだろう。朝の河川… Key beats: だがサービス道路脇では、河川管理車を装ったワゴンが止まり、作業服の男たちがカラーコーンを並べていた。迂回を装って標的を車道寄りへ誘導し、そこで囲い込むつもりなのだろう。朝の河川敷には工事や点検が似合いすぎるぶん、こういう偽装は厄介だった。 セラは対岸から見えたコーン配置の不自然さで、その仕事を見切った。猫耳カチューシャ型の警護支援ユニットが短い警告音を返す。三人。近い。可愛らしいメイド風ジョギングウェアの裾を乱さずに処理するには、正面からではなく側線を切るのが早い。 「復路まで工事にしないでください」 まずワゴンのスライドドアへ細い金具を噛ませ、閉まらなくする。男が振り向いたところで、コーンを持つ手首へ蹴りを入れる。コーンは転がるが、サトーの走路へは行かせない。二人目が誘導棒を上げた瞬間には、セラの肩が鳩尾へ入った。息を失った身体をサービス道路の白線内へ折りたたみ、最後の一人にはジャケットの袖口から針をひとつ。十分だった。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sera-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sera-part of the same return-bank incident as scene-002-002-002-sato. Keep the same opposite bank, same service road context, and same stronger morning sun as the paired image. Sato must remain an unaware background runner moving through the background and must face his route rather than the incident. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a cute maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Create a covert riverside service-road action image with Sera dominant, breaking a vehicle-linked ambush or worker disguise attack while still reading as a swift parallel runner. Keep Sato smaller in the background, continuing his return leg and unaware.
